new_classes.label_en: Other Spirituous Beverage not elsewhere specified (CN 2208 90 69)
new_classes.label_de: Andere alkoholhaltige Getränke, anderweitig nicht genannt (KN 2208 90 69)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverages of heading 2208 not classified in any other subheading of that heading; includes, inter alia, spirituous beverages with added aerated water (e.g. whisky-soda), tea with alcohol, mixtures of spirituous beverages, and mixtures of spirituous beverages with fruit or vegetable juices, as described in the CN legal notes to subheading 2208 90 69.
A quality borne by a spirituous beverage indicating that it is a mixture of tea and ethyl alcohol or a spirituous beverage, used as a discriminating criterion for CN subheading 2208 90 69.

A quality borne by a beverage indicating that it is a mixture of two or more spirituous beverages, or a mixture of spirituous beverages with fruit or vegetable juices, as described for CN subheading 2208 90 69.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for CN 2208 90 69 identifies several concrete product types included in this subheading: (1) spirituous beverages with added aerated water (e.g. whisky-soda), (2) tea with alcohol, and (3) spirituous beverages mixed with other spirituous beverages or with fruit/vegetable juices — plus a reference to HS Explanatory Note items 14–18 for heading 2208. The axioms cover: (a) a new class OtherSpiritousBeverageNES as a subclass of SpiritousBeverage, the correct parent; (b) restrictions linking it to AddedSodaWaterQuality (already in TBox) and AeratedWater (already in TBox) for whisky-soda type beverages; (c) two new quality classes (TeaAlcoholMixtureQuality and SpiritousBeverageMixtureQuality) to capture the tea-with-alcohol and mixed-spirits criteria. Gaps: the HS Explanatory Note items 14–18 cannot be modelled without access to the full HS EN text; the text is truncated mid-sentence (fruit/vegetable juice mixtures are mentioned but the note is cut off), so coverage of that criterion is partial. The disjointness complement with OtherSpiritousBeverage (CN 2208 90 56) is included to discriminate this sibling. Coverage is set to 0.72 reflecting the truncated legal text and the unmodelled HS EN items 14–18.
